_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: After 7 days of training, the mice were tested in a probe trial, a very sensitive measure of spatial learning... This is not surprising since this measure is known to be very insensitive to changes in spatial learning
details: Successfully detected spatial learning deficits in Nf1+/− mice and specific conditional mutant lines during probe trial, while showing no differences in acquisition training
